category_uid: Integer: Required: Numeric category UID as defined by OCSF.
is_mfa: Boolean: Required: True if MFA is enabled, False if disabled.

user.name: String: Required: Unique identifier or username of the account associated with the authentication event.
user.uid: String: Required: Unique identifier of the user in the source system.

src_endpoint: String: Required: Name of the platform this data came from e.g. GitHub, Shuffle, Okta. Write the name directly, not a variable.

org.name: String: Required: Name of the organization or tenant associated with the user account.
org.uid: String: Optional: Unique identifier of the organization.

message: String: Optional: Additional contextual or debug information related to the authentication event.

user.type: String: Optional: If known, explicitly specify the user role or privilege level e.g. Admin, User, Viewer. This must be a fixed value, not a variable.

logon_type_id: Integer: Optional: Numeric identifier representing the type of logon e.g. interactive, remote, service, batch.(0:Unknown, 1: System, 2: Interactive, 3: Network, 4: Batch, 5: OS Service, 7: Unlock, 8:Network Cleartext, 9: New Credentials, 10: Remote Interactive, 11: Cached Interactive, 12: Cached Remote Interactive, 13: Cached Unlock, 99: Other)
activity_id: Integer: Optional: Identifier representing the specific authentication-related activity or event type.(0: Unknown, 1: Logon, 2: Logoff, 3: Authentication Ticket, 4: Service Ticket Request, 5: Service Ticket Renew, 6: Preauthorisations, 7:Account Switch, 99:Other)
status: String: Optional: Human-readable description indicating the outcome of the authentication attempt e.g. Success, Failure.
status_id: Integer: Optional: Normalized numeric identifier representing the authentication status. 0 Unknown, 1 Success, 2 Failure, 99 Other.
status_detail: String: Optional: Additional explanation or context describing the meaning of the status_id value.
confidence_id: Integer: Optional: Confidence score 0-100 indicating the likelihood that the finding or event is accurate and valid.
category_name: String: Optional: Human-readable name of the category corresponding to category_uid.
start_time: String: Optional: Time when the authentication event or session started in ISO 8601 format.
severity_id: Integer: Optional: Numeric severity level indicating the risk associated with the authentication event.
status_code: String: Optional: System-generated code representing error or response status useful for troubleshooting.
last_seen_time: String: Optional: Last recorded session time of the user in ISO 8601 format.

metadata.version: String: Required: OCSF schema version e.g. 1.0.0.
metadata.uid: String: Optional: Original event UID in the source system. If no relevant ID exists keep blank.
metadata.logged_time: String: Optional: Time the event was logged in ISO 8601 format.

custom_attributes.comments: Array: Optional: Array of objects with fields author, timestamp, text representing analyst comments.
custom_attributes.tlp: Integer: Optional: Traffic Light Protocol classification. Default: 2.
custom_attributes.is_new_logon: Boolean: Optional: Indicates logon is from a device not seen before or a first time account logon.
custom_attributes.custom_fields: Object: Optional: Arbitrary key-value pairs for vendor-specific or workflow-specific fields.
custom_attributes.assignee: String: Optional: Email or identifier of the analyst or system responsible for this event.
